app.footer: Stay focused, stay present, achieve your goals.

landing.heroDescription: Stay focused, work together silently, and achieve your goals with our minimalist study platform designed to reduce distractions and boost concentration.
landing.freeNote: No credit card required • Free to use
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to stay focused
landing.featuresSubtitle: Simple, effective tools designed to help you concentrate without overwhelming you
landing.featureTimerDescription: Customizable Pomodoro timer with focus and break sessions. Stay on track with visual and audio cues.
landing.featureNotesDescription: Capture ideas and tasks instantly. Keep everything organized in one clean, distraction-free interface.
landing.featureRoomsDescription: Work alongside others without distraction. See who's focusing and stay motivated together.
landing.benefitOneDescription: Soft colors and clear layouts reduce cognitive overload, helping you focus on what matters.
landing.benefitTwoDescription: No social feeds, no notifications, no clutter. Just you and your work.
landing.benefitThreeDescription: Whether you're a student, freelancer, or remote worker, StudyPal adapts to your workflow.
landing.pomodoroNote: The proven Pomodoro Technique for maximum productivity
landing.ctaDescription: Join students and professionals who achieve more with StudyPal

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to continue where you left off.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account and verify it in a single streamlined flow.
auth.resetSubtitle: Reset your password with a compact verification step.
auth.emailOtpHint: Use the 6-digit code from your email.
auth.smsOtpHint: Use the 6-digit code sent to your phone.

messages.passwordUpdated: Password updated successfully. Sign in with your new password.
messages.completeFields: Complete all password conditions and required fields.
messages.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Resend a new code.

dashboard.setDailyTarget: Set a daily target to track momentum
dashboard.setFocusTarget: Set a focus-time target to measure consistency
dashboard.aiSuggestionSubtitle: One focused idea to guide your next study sprint.
dashboard.noSuggestionDescription: Refresh to get a smart next-step recommendation based on your current progress.
dashboard.freshGuidance: Fresh AI guidance tuned to your current dashboard state.

revision.title: Modules
revision.subtitle: Organize modules, documents, and AI resources
revision.noModulesDescription: Create your first revision module to get started.
revision.noMatchingDescription: Try a different search or start a new module.

rooms.title: Co-Study
rooms.subtitle: Study together. Stay accountable.
rooms.emptyTitle: No active co-study rooms right now
rooms.emptyDescription: Be the first to start one.
rooms.alreadyInRoom: You are already in another room. Leave it before joining a new one.

timer.takeBreak: Take a break, you deserve it

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure application language and AI output preferences separately.
settings.appLanguageDescription: Controls the interface language across the whole application.
settings.outputLanguageDescription: Controls the preferred language for generated AI content, independent from the UI.
settings.useDocumentLanguageDescription: When enabled, AI features can prefer the language detected from the uploaded document.
